items.description: Inject PAYPAL_BUSINESS_CLIENT_ID into the protected server runtime outside the repository.
required_evidence: protected runtime environment file updated outside the repository
env ref resolves non-empty on the protected server
items.rollback_reference: remove the env ref and keep the PayPal webhook receiver inactive

items.description: Inject PAYPAL_BUSINESS_CLIENT_SECRET into the protected server runtime outside the repository.
required_evidence: protected runtime environment file updated outside the repository
env ref resolves non-empty on the protected server
items.rollback_reference: remove the env ref and keep the PayPal webhook receiver inactive

items.description: Inject PAYPAL_BUSINESS_WEBHOOK_ID into the protected server runtime outside the repository.
required_evidence: protected runtime environment file updated outside the repository
env ref resolves non-empty on the protected server
items.rollback_reference: remove the env ref and keep the PayPal webhook receiver inactive

items.description: Local synthetic signature and replay self-test passes inside the workspace.
required_evidence: first synthetic delivery returns HTTP 202 with verified signature state
second synthetic delivery returns HTTP 409 with replay_suspected state
items.rollback_reference: keep the runtime in local proof-only mode and do not activate the external receiver

items.description: Deliver a real PayPal staging webhook into the protected receiver and capture server-side evidence.
required_evidence: real staging delivery reaches /protected/paypal/webhook on the protected server
signature verification succeeds with the real PAYPAL_BUSINESS_WEBHOOK_ID
evidence log entry is captured on the target server
items.rollback_reference: deactivate webhook delivery and clear the staging receiver approval before retrying

items.description: Record the explicit approval that activates the protected PayPal webhook receiver for real billing events.
required_evidence: named approver recorded outside the repository
activation window and rollback owner recorded
items.rollback_reference: remove activation approval and disable the protected webhook route before live billing resumes

items.description: Bind a real signing key or signing service reference behind local_server_signing_key.
required_evidence: signing reference exists outside the repository
signing test passes on a non-public protected artifact
items.rollback_reference: disconnect the signing reference and keep delivery inactive

items.description: Verify the protected delivery infrastructure target and grant rule in the target environment.
required_evidence: protected delivery target is reachable only through the approved protected lane
delivery grant rule is documented and reversible
items.rollback_reference: disable protected delivery and fall back to no customer release

items.description: Confirm the final support and escalation path behind the published support email.
required_evidence: named escalation owner recorded
response and handoff path documented
items.rollback_reference: hold customer release until support ownership is re-confirmed

items.description: Confirm who owns billing and invoice handling when automated reconciliation remains inconclusive.
required_evidence: named billing owner recorded
invoice exception path documented
items.rollback_reference: pause payment-backed release decisions until the billing owner is re-confirmed

items.description: Confirm the named authority for the final protected customer release decision.
required_evidence: named release approver recorded
go/no-go decision path documented
items.rollback_reference: keep customer release in approval_required state

items.description: Confirm the rollback window, rollback owner and restore path for the real cutover.
required_evidence: rollback owner recorded
rollback window and restore path documented
items.rollback_reference: do not start the external cutover until the rollback window is re-established

abort_criteria: any required PayPal env ref remains missing after the protected server deployment step
real staging signature verification fails against the protected receiver
replay protection does not block duplicate delivery on the protected server
signing or protected delivery ownership remains unconfirmed
support, billing or release authority remains unconfirmed
rollback_ready_signals: protected delivery remains disabled until explicit release approval is recorded
webhook activation can be reverted without exposing any public route
previous package or policy remains callable through the rollback channel
support receives the cutover record and escalation target before release
next_smallest_safe_step: inject PayPal env refs and verify the protected webhook receiver in the real staging server context
